scripts.tui: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js tui
scripts.typecheck: npm run build && npm run typecheck --workspaces
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test --workspaces
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run typecheck --workspaces && npm run typecheck:test && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run schema:check && npm run check:internal-imports && npm run check:reserved:strict && npm run test --workspaces
scripts.release:check: npm run check && node packages/cli/dist/index.js run "inspect this repo" --workspace examples/repo-pilot --target README.md --trace-level minimal --model deterministic && npm run release:install-smoke
